title: Amazon Bird Food Dataset
description: This dataset contains information on bird food products listed on Amazon, including details such as name, price, ratings, reviews, and seller information. The dataset is intended for use in e-commerce analysis, product research, and data-driven marketing studies.
citation: If using this dataset, please cite as: Amazon Bird Food Dataset, curated by Octaprice, 2024.

columns.name: additionalProperties
columns.description: A JSON array containing various product specifications including dimensions, weight, manufacturer details, ASIN, country of origin, model number, and sales rank information
columns.example: [{"name": "Product Dimensions", "value": "11.9 x 8.2 x 5.2 inches"}, {"name": "Item Weight", "value": "8 pounds"}, {"name": "Manufacturer", "value": "Wagner's"}, {"name": "ASIN", "value": "B0031066V8"}, {"name": "Country of Origin", "value": "USA"}, {"name": "Item model number", "value": "62042"}, {"name": "Is Discontinued By Manufacturer", "value": "No"}, {"name": "Best Sellers Rank", "value": "#2,512 in Patio, Lawn & Garden ( See Top 100 in Patio, Lawn & Garden ) #65 in Bird Seed"}]

columns.name: brandName
columns.description: The manufacturer or brand name of the bird food product

columns.name: breadcrumbs
columns.description: The hierarchical navigation path showing the product's category structure on Amazon
columns.example: [{"name": "Patio, Lawn & Garden"}, {"name": "Outdoor D\u00e9cor"}, {"name": "Backyard Birding & Wildlife"}, {"name": "Birds"}, {"name": "Food"}, {"name": "Bird Seed"}]

columns.name: color
columns.description: The color or variety name of the bird food product

columns.name: currency
columns.description: The currency used for pricing (e.g., USD for United States Dollar)

columns.name: description
columns.description: The plain text product description providing detailed information about the bird food
columns.example: Wagner's Songbird Supreme has more of what songbirds want. Songbird Supreme is our favorite blend because it contains more of what your songbirds crave. This blend includes high concentrations of tasty quality seeds preferred by the songbirds you want to see in your backyard. With 50% of the blend being black oil sunflower, striped sunflower and sunflower chips, your favorite birds will flock to the feeder. The peanut kernels, safflower seeds and white millet will assure that you can nurture and enjoy a wide variety of beautiful songbirds throughout the year. By adding only the best ingredients we have created a highly attractive and nutritious blend for backyard feeding. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner's.

columns.name: descriptionRaw
columns.description: The HTML-formatted version of the product description
columns.example: Wagner's Songbird Supreme has more of what songbirds want. Songbird Supreme is our favorite blend because it contains more of what your songbirds crave. This blend includes high concentrations of tasty quality seeds preferred by the songbirds you want to see in your backyard. With 50% of the blend being black oil sunflower, striped sunflower and sunflower chips, your favorite birds will flock to the feeder. The peanut kernels, safflower seeds and white millet will assure that you can nurture and enjoy a wide variety of beautiful songbirds throughout the year. By adding only the best ingredients we have created a highly attractive and nutritious blend for backyard feeding. Trust your backyard birds to the experts at Wagner's.

columns.name: features
columns.description: An array of key product features and benefits
columns.example: ["A blend of preferred seed to attract your favorite backyard songbirds", "Contains 50% sunflower and other premium wild bird food ingredients", "Can be fed in a tube, hopper, or platform feeders", "Convenient reclosable slider", "Made in the USA"]

columns.name: gtin
columns.description: Global Trade Item Number (includes UPC, EAN, etc.) for product identification

columns.name: imageUrls
columns.description: An array of URLs pointing to product images on Amazon's servers

columns.name: inStock
columns.description: Boolean indicator of whether the product is currently available for purchase

columns.name: listedPrice
columns.description: The original price of the product before any discounts

columns.name: mpn
columns.description: Manufacturer Part Number - unique identifier assigned by the manufacturer

columns.name: name
columns.description: The complete product title as displayed on Amazon
columns.example: Wagner's 62042 Songbird Supreme Blend Wild Bird Food, 8-Pound Bag

columns.name: other_sellers
columns.description: Array of alternative sellers offering the same product, including their names and prices

columns.name: rating
columns.description: Average customer rating out of 5 stars

columns.name: reviewCount
columns.description: Total number of customer reviews for the product

columns.name: salePrice
columns.description: The current selling price, which may include discounts

columns.name: scrapedDate
columns.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp indicating when the data was collected

columns.name: sellerName
columns.description: Name of the primary seller offering the product

columns.name: size
columns.description: Physical dimensions or weight specifications of the product

columns.name: sku
columns.description: Amazon's unique identifier for the product (ASIN)

columns.name: style
columns.description: The product style or category specification

columns.name: url
columns.description: The complete Amazon product page URL

usage: For non-commercial, academic, and research purposes only.
